nodes.body: `curate.ps1` never attempts to locate/run the Wave 3 `@akubly/skillsmith-runtime` hook entrypoint (it only checks CairnО“Г‡Г–s `dist/hooks/sessionStart.js`). That means the default hook path will always run without the prescriber orchestration factory, so Curator-driven prescribers wonО“Г‡Г–t execute in real hook usage despite being implemented. Add candidates for `@akubly/skillsmith-runtime/dist/hooks/sessionStart.js` (global install + repo checkout) and only warn/fallback to Cairn when the skillsmith-runtime hook isnО“Г‡Г–t present.
`ProfileGranularity` is declared but never used. This adds noise and can confuse readers about intended granularity handling; please remove it (or use it) to keep the module lean.

The scope docО“Г‡Г–s `PrescriberRunResult` shape is out of sync with the canonical contract in `@akubly/types`: `skippedReason` is documented as `string`, but the code exports a narrow union (`'time-budget-exceeded'`) and is also described elsewhere as being set for О“Г‡ВЈno profileО“Г‡ВҐ skips. Update the doc snippet and operator-visible behavior table to match the actual contract/behavior (no-profile currently returns zero counts without a skippedReason).

The О“Г‡ВЈHint Persistence OwnershipО“Г‡ВҐ flow doesnО“Г‡Г–t match the shipped implementation: `@akubly/skillsmith-runtime` persists via `insertHintIfNew()` (and doesnО“Г‡Г–t use `hasActiveOptimizationHint()`), and there is no `force=true` option exposed/implemented here. Please update the flow section to reflect the actual dedup+persistence API and remove/relocate the `force=true` discussion unless itО“Г‡Г–s implemented in this wave.
